description: GoldenGoose Coin (GOLD) emerged in 2023 on Ethereum as a values-driven meme asset promoting ethics, gratitude, and long-term prosperity through patience and steady community growth. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 GOLD gives holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, turning GOLD into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: GoldenGoose Coin
